thinking: I stand in a kitchen-like cafe area facing a yellow table where a woman customer sits on a wooden chair near the left side of the room; cabinets, pots, a sink, a range hood, and a refrigerator are visible behind her. The customer leans forward over the table, places her hands near the tabletop/chair, and pushes herself up from sitting to standing while turning slightly toward me. I then move/pan rightward and forward away from the table, causing the customer to pass out of frame on the left as the blank wall corridor and the partition become central. The scene ends with me oriented toward the partition and kitchen fixtures, no other customer actions visible.
caption: CLERK: Intent was to leave the seated customer area or reposition within the cafe, and I did so by turning and walking rightward toward the partition/kitchen side. CUSTOMER: Intent appeared to be to get up and engage or prepare to move, expressed by leaning forward, bracing on the table/chair, standing up, and orienting toward the clerk.
